subcodes.first_line: O radiant youth! Thy letter hath arrived; from its contents, the utmost attraction to the Abha Kingdom was discerned. The Schwarz family hath complete love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان نورانی نامه تو رسید از مضمون نهایت انجذاب بملکوت ابهی معلوم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
